title: Nationale Opera & Ballet Lunchconcert
full_description: A free weekly lunchtime concert at the Nationale Opera & Ballet building — part of the ongoing series that opens the building and its resident orchestral musicians to the public during the working day. The NOB lunchconcerts present chamber music, vocal recitals, and ensemble pieces by musicians from the opera and ballet companies, in an informal concert setting at 12:30.
ai_summary: A free midday concert at the Nationale Opera & Ballet in Amsterdam — an informal chamber performance by musicians from the resident companies, open to all at lunchtime.
